2uWlgY0OrFKOxPyPkzvf.pros: Fully remodeled with hardwood floors; 2 blocks from UC Berkeley; steps from Gourmet Ghetto and Shattuck Ave; attached garage available; top-rated schools nearby (10/10 elementary and middle)
2uWlgY0OrFKOxPyPkzvf.cons: No pets; shared laundry; no A/C; tenant pays gas, electric, and internet; $50/person/mo utility fee on top of rent
2uWlgY0OrFKOxPyPkzvf.notes: Remodeled 1bd/1ba, 600 sqft, available Aug 16 2026 at $2,400/mo (recently reduced from $2,500). Garage parking $100/mo if available; $50/person/mo fee for water/sewer/garbage/common PG&E. AC Transit Line 67 stop nearby.

9gl0JvO1ctHsV9ReTdCB.address: Near Shattuck Ave & Gourmet Ghetto, Berkeley, CA 94709
9gl0JvO1ctHsV9ReTdCB.pros: Prime Gourmet Ghetto location; semi-furnished (couch, coffee table, twin mattress available); brand new kitchen and flooring; porcelain tile bath; double-paned windows; 0.5 mi to BART; steps from Cheeseboard, Andronico's, Trader Joe's, and farmers markets; easy walk to North Gate UC entrance
9gl0JvO1ctHsV9ReTdCB.cons: No pets; one-person occupancy (add $150/mo for second person); coin-op shared laundry only; no A/C; tenant pays Sonic fiber internet; carport parking $85/mo extra; no exact street address listed
9gl0JvO1ctHsV9ReTdCB.notes: Professionally managed; 1bd/1ba, 535 sqft, available Jul 1, 2026 at $2,399/mo (12-month lease, renewable). Carport parking $85/mo. Contact: (650) 260-8780; lister prefers email. No smoking/vaping building.
9gl0JvO1ctHsV9ReTdCB.title: Cute 1bd Prime Gourmet Ghetto, Walk to UCB

ASP5POPgT2IF6uQkOswC.pros: In-unit W/D; rooftop deck with BBQ and SF views; stainless steel appliances; granite countertops; recessed lighting; natural light; bike storage; secure entry; elevator; biker's paradise (94); 10/10 Washington Elementary and Willard Middle; 9/10 Berkeley High nearby
ASP5POPgT2IF6uQkOswC.cons: Pricier 2bd/3bd units go up to $4,895; parking is optional/extra charge; walk score only 87 (not walker's paradise)
ASP5POPgT2IF6uQkOswC.notes: 8-unit building at 1901 Dwight Way; Unit 205 is 1bd/1ba, 612 sqft, available now at $2,421/mo. Also has 1bd from $2,695, 2bd from $2,995, and 3bd from $4,795. Optional secured onsite parking available.
ASP5POPgT2IF6uQkOswC.title: Stranda Apartments – Unit 205

UN0eJPx8uTj4hO71VzBP.pros: Pet friendly; 0.3 mi to UC Berkeley; excellent transit (90/100); gated community; online payment portal; balcony in select units; walk-in closet in select units; 10/10 Willard Middle and 9/10 Berkeley High nearby; limited-time offer up to 4 weeks free (lease by Jun 30 2026)
UN0eJPx8uTj4hO71VzBP.cons: No parking available; shared laundry only; very compact at 416 sqft; $35/applicant application fee; studios go down to 280 sqft
UN0eJPx8uTj4hO71VzBP.notes: Professionally managed by Ballast Investments; 1bd/1ba from 416 sqft, $2,395–$2,795/mo, available Aug 5 2026. Also has studios ($1,895–$1,995) and 2bd ($2,895–$3,095). Office 7 days/week 9am–6pm. Contact: (415) 423-2615.
UN0eJPx8uTj4hO71VzBP.title: 2333 Channing Way

Y5XcF1aaVNxGVzTgOKoq.cons: Carpet and linoleum floors (no hardwood); listed rent is a starting price (actual may be higher); Northwest Berkeley location is farther from campus
